lean/AsiStackProofs/Alignment.lean::admi.semantic_role: Projection of an assumed Boolean implication; not an independent constitutional invariant.
assumptions: The proposition to be concluded is already supplied as the leading hypothesis over one hand-authored record.
excluded_effects: Predicate correctness, constitutional completeness, plan evaluation, self-modification detection, runtime rejection, reviewer quality, safety, and transfer are outside the theorem.
lean/AsiStackProofs/Alignment.lean::admi.review_rationale: The proof only introduces hypotheses and applies the assumed predicate. Keeping it on the active evidence surface would restate the desired result as an assumption; preserve the frozen row and replace the target with explicit transition semantics.

lean/AsiStackProofs/Alignment.lean::prot.semantic_role: Negative transition case: protected weakening or migration cannot take the modeled ordinary acceptance path when its declared review or preservation condition fails.
assumptions: The finite ConstitutionalChangeDecision or ConstitutionalTransitionDecision fields truthfully encode the relevant change, protection, review, rollback, conflict, and selected route.
ConstitutionalChangeSafe or ConstitutionalTransitionSafe is the governing model predicate for this bounded decision.
excluded_effects: Normative validity, predicate completeness, reviewer competence or independence, real self-modification detection, concurrent or temporal behavior, deployed enforcement, rollback execution, human outcomes, safety, and transfer are not modeled.
lean/AsiStackProofs/Alignment.lean::prot.review_rationale: This is a genuine case reduction over an explicit transition predicate and preserves a useful bounded negative case. It remains too narrow for the chapter core and still needs guard mutation, reachable-trace generation, and an executable refinement consumer.

excluded_effects: Invariant adequacy, evaluator independence, proposal quality, authority/security/resource effects, deployed gating, rollback, monitoring, safety, and transfer are outside the theorem.
lean/AsiStackProofs/SelfImprovement.lean.review_rationale: The theorem restates the target as an assumption; preserve lineage, retire it from active evidence, and replace the target with reachable state-transition semantics.
